message:
feat(bd-9chy.3): add stdio invariants schema + verifier module

- Create tests/conformance/stdio_invariants.v1.json with 11 entrypoint
  invariants for fopen, fread, fwrite, fseek, ftell, fclose, ungetc,
  fflush, fileno, feof, ferror, and clearerr

- Define DSL for expressing pre/post conditions:
  - fp.in_registry, fp.fd >= 0, fp.eof, fp.error flags
  - return comparisons, errno checks
  - logical operators (implies, and, or, not)

- Add verify_invariants.rs module with:
  - InvariantsFile, Invariant, LatticeTransition schema types
  - InvariantCheckResult, InvariantVerificationSummary for results
  - load_invariants(), load_default_invariants() loaders
  - Test coverage for invariant loading and summary construction

Ref: bd-9chy.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,259 @@
+{
+  "version": "v1",
+  "schema": "stdio_invariants",
+  "captured_at": "2026-04-13T00:00:00Z",
+  "description": "Machine-checkable invariants for stdio entrypoints per Plan v4 §1.5. Each invariant specifies pre-conditions, post-conditions, and SafetyState lattice transitions.",
+  "dsl": {
+    "description": "Simple expression DSL for invariant conditions",
+    "operators": {
+      "fp.in_registry": "FILE pointer is registered in native stream registry",
+      "fp.fd >= 0": "FILE has valid non-negative file descriptor",
+      "fp.eof": "FILE has EOF flag set",
+      "fp.error": "FILE has error flag set",
+      "fp.readable": "FILE was opened for reading",
+      "fp.writable": "FILE was opened for writing",
+      "fp.orientation == X": "FILE orientation is X (unset/wide/byte)",
+      "return == X": "Function return value equals X",
+      "return >= 0": "Function return value is non-negative",
+      "return <= n": "Function return value <= requested count n",
+      "errno == X": "errno is set to value X",
+      "errno unchanged": "errno was not modified by the call",
+      "not(expr)": "Logical negation",
+      "and(a, b)": "Logical conjunction",
+      "or(a, b)": "Logical disjunction",
+      "implies(a, b)": "If a then b (a → b)"
+    }
+  },
+  "invariants": [
+    {
+      "function": "fopen",
+      "spec_section": "C11 7.21.5.3, POSIX.1-2024 fopen",
+      "description": "Open a file and associate a stream with it",
+      "pre_conditions": [
+        "pathname != NULL",
+        "mode != NULL",
+        "mode is valid (r|w|a with optional +,b,x,e modifiers)"
+      ],
+      "post_conditions": [
+        "implies(return != NULL, return.in_registry)",
+        "implies(return != NULL, return.fd >= 0)",
+        "implies(return != NULL, errno unchanged)",
+        "implies(return == NULL, errno in {ENOENT, EACCES, EEXIST, EINVAL, EMFILE, ENOMEM})"
+      ],
+      "lattice_transition": {
+        "on_success": "OpenedValid",
+        "on_failure": "NotOpen"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "function": "fread",
+      "spec_section": "C11 7.21.8.1, POSIX.1-2024 fread",
+      "description": "Read elements from a stream into an array",
+      "pre_conditions": [
+        "fp.in_registry",
+        "fp.readable",
+        "ptr != NULL",
+        "not(fp.error)"
+      ],
+      "post_conditions": [
+        "return <= nmemb",
+        "implies(return < nmemb, or(fp.eof, fp.error))",
+        "implies(return == nmemb, not(fp.eof))",
+        "implies(fp.error, errno != 0)"
+      ],
+      "lattice_transition": {
+        "on_success": "ReadingValid",
+        "on_short_read": "ReachedEOF",
+        "on_error": "ErrorState"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "function": "fwrite",
+      "spec_section": "C11 7.21.8.2, POSIX.1-2024 fwrite",
+      "description": "Write elements from an array to a stream",
+      "pre_conditions": [
+        "fp.in_registry",
+        "fp.writable",
+        "ptr != NULL",
+        "not(fp.error)"
+      ],
+      "post_conditions": [
+        "return <= nmemb",
+        "implies(return < nmemb, fp.error)",
+        "implies(fp.error, errno != 0)"
+      ],
+      "lattice_transition": {
+        "on_success": "WritingValid",
+        "on_error": "ErrorState"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "function": "fseek",
+      "spec_section": "C11 7.21.9.2, POSIX.1-2024 fseek",
+      "description": "Set file position indicator",
+      "pre_conditions": [
+        "fp.in_registry",
+        "whence in {SEEK_SET, SEEK_CUR, SEEK_END}"
+      ],
+      "post_conditions": [
+        "implies(return == 0, not(fp.eof))",
+        "implies(return == 0, not(fp.error))",
+        "implies(return != 0, fp.error)"
+      ],
+      "lattice_transition": {
+        "on_success": "PositionValid",
+        "on_error": "ErrorState"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "function": "ftell",
+      "spec_section": "C11 7.21.9.4, POSIX.1-2024 ftell",
+      "description": "Get current file position",
+      "pre_conditions": [
+        "fp.in_registry"
+      ],
+      "post_conditions": [
+        "implies(return >= 0, not(fp.error))",
+        "implies(return == -1, fp.error)",
+        "implies(return == -1, errno != 0)"
+      ],
+      "lattice_transition": {
+        "on_success": "PositionValid",
+        "on_error": "ErrorState"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "function": "fclose",
+      "spec_section": "C11 7.21.5.1, POSIX.1-2024 fclose",
+      "description": "Close a stream and flush pending output",
+      "pre_conditions": [
+        "fp.in_registry"
+      ],
+      "post_conditions": [
+        "implies(return == 0, not(fp.in_registry))",
+        "implies(return == EOF, errno != 0)"
+      ],
+      "lattice_transition": {
+        "on_success": "Closed",
+        "on_error": "Closed"
+      },
+      "notes": "Stream is always removed from registry, even on error"
+    },
+    {
+      "function": "ungetc",
+      "spec_section": "C11 7.21.7.10, POSIX.1-2024 ungetc",
+      "description": "Push a character back onto a stream",
+      "pre_conditions": [
+        "fp.in_registry",
+        "fp.readable",
+        "c != EOF or c in [0, 255]"
+      ],
+      "post_conditions": [
+        "implies(return != EOF, return == c)",
+        "implies(return != EOF, not(fp.eof))",
+        "implies(c == EOF, return == EOF)"
+      ],
+      "lattice_transition": {
+        "on_success": "ReadingValid",
+        "on_failure": "ReadingValid"
+      },
+      "notes": "POSIX guarantees at least one pushback; failure returns EOF but does not set error flag"
+    },
+    {
+      "function": "fflush",
+      "spec_section": "C11 7.21.5.2, POSIX.1-2024 fflush",
+      "description": "Flush pending output or discard pending input",
+      "pre_conditions": [
+        "or(fp == NULL, fp.in_registry)"
+      ],
+      "post_conditions": [
+        "implies(return == 0, not(fp.error))",
+        "implies(return == EOF, fp.error)",
+        "implies(return == EOF, errno != 0)"
+      ],
+      "lattice_transition": {
+        "on_success": "FlushedValid",
+        "on_error": "ErrorState"
+      },
+      "notes": "fp == NULL flushes all output streams"
+    },
+    {
+      "function": "fileno",
+      "spec_section": "POSIX.1-2024 fileno",
+      "description": "Get file descriptor from stream",
+      "pre_conditions": [
+        "fp.in_registry"
+      ],
+      "post_conditions": [
+        "implies(return >= 0, return == fp.fd)",
+        "implies(return == -1, errno == EBADF)"
+      ],
+      "lattice_transition": {
+        "on_success": "StateUnchanged",
+        "on_error": "StateUnchanged"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "function": "feof",
+      "spec_section": "C11 7.21.10.2, POSIX.1-2024 feof",
+      "description": "Test end-of-file indicator",
+      "pre_conditions": [
+        "fp.in_registry"
+      ],
+      "post_conditions": [
+        "implies(return != 0, fp.eof)",
+        "implies(return == 0, not(fp.eof))",
+        "errno unchanged"
+      ],
+      "lattice_transition": {
+        "on_any": "StateUnchanged"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "function": "ferror",
+      "spec_section": "C11 7.21.10.3, POSIX.1-2024 ferror",
+      "description": "Test error indicator",
+      "pre_conditions": [
+        "fp.in_registry"
+      ],
+      "post_conditions": [
+        "implies(return != 0, fp.error)",
+        "implies(return == 0, not(fp.error))",
+        "errno unchanged"
+      ],
+      "lattice_transition": {
+        "on_any": "StateUnchanged"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "function": "clearerr",
+      "spec_section": "C11 7.21.10.1, POSIX.1-2024 clearerr",
+      "description": "Clear end-of-file and error indicators",
+      "pre_conditions": [
+        "fp.in_registry"
+      ],
+      "post_conditions": [
+        "not(fp.eof)",
+        "not(fp.error)",
+        "errno unchanged"
+      ],
+      "lattice_transition": {
+        "on_any": "ClearedIndicators"
+      },
+      "notes": "Always succeeds for valid streams"
+    }
+  ],
+  "lattice_states": {
+    "NotOpen": "Stream does not exist or was never opened",
+    "OpenedValid": "Stream opened successfully, no I/O yet",
+    "ReadingValid": "Stream in valid reading state",
+    "WritingValid": "Stream in valid writing state",
+    "PositionValid": "Position indicator is valid",
+    "FlushedValid": "Stream was flushed, pending data written",
+    "ReachedEOF": "End-of-file condition reached",
+    "ErrorState": "Error flag is set",
+    "ClearedIndicators": "Error and EOF indicators were cleared",
+    "Closed": "Stream was closed and removed from registry",
+    "StateUnchanged": "Stream state not modified by the operation"
+  }
+}
